name: Number 79: Battlin' Boxer Nova Kaiser
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７９ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>新</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のカイザー
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Nanajūkyū Bāningu Nakkurā Shinsei no Kaizā
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Gains 100 ATK for each material attached to it. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can attach 1 "Battlin' Boxer" monster from your hand or GY to this card as material. When this card in your possession is destroyed by your opponent's card and sent to your GY while it has material: You can target Level 4 or lower "Battlin' Boxer" monsters in your GY, up to the number of materials this card had on the field; Special Summon them.

action: Attaches from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
